schema.entity_ref: Entity ID from entities.json (e.g. P0001, O0003)
schema.label: Human-readable label for the location point
schema.source: How this location was obtained (EXIF, reverse geocode, manual, corporate filing, etc.)

temporal.observed_utc: ISO 8601 — when the entity was at this location
temporal.collected_utc: ISO 8601 — when this data was captured
